testimonials.title: Students
testimonials.subtitle: Don't just take our word for it. Here's what people are saying 💬
testimonials.bottomText: Join 10,000+ students who've found better opportunities
testimonials.nextStory: Your success story could be next

testimonial1.name: Priya
testimonial1.content: Okay so I used to spend HOURS scrolling. Now? I get 5 matches that actually make sense. The transparency thing where it shows WHY I matched? Game changer honestly.

testimonial2.name: Rahul
testimonial2.content: Bruh, the auto-resume thing is insane. I had no clue how to write one that ATS systems would actually read. YuvaSetu just... did it? Got my offer in 2 weeks.

testimonial3.name: Ananya
testimonial3.content: Living in a small town with terrible internet, the SMS alerts literally saved me. Never missed a single opportunity even when WiFi was down. They really thought this through.

testimonial4.name: Vikram
testimonial4.content: The AI actually GETS it. Like, it understood that my mechanical background + Python = perfect for automation roles. Mind = blown 🤯

testimonial5.name: Neha
testimonial5.content: Finally! A platform that doesn't throw 500 jobs at me and expect me to figure it out. Clear explanations, curated list. Way less stressful.

testimonial6.name: Arjun
testimonial6.content: The semantic matching is wild. I mentioned TensorFlow once and it connected me to Deep Learning roles automatically. This is literally the future.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about YuvaSetu and how we're transforming career discovery.
faq.answer1: YuvaSetu is an AI-powered career platform that eliminates opportunity fatigue by  matching you with your top 5 most relevant job opportunities using explainable AI. We provide transparent recommendations so you understand exactly why each job matches your profile.
faq.question2: How does the AI matching work?
faq.answer2: Our matching engine uses lightweight, efficient machine learning models to analyze your skills, experience, and preferences. Unlike heavy language models, we focus on delivering fast, accurate matches with complete transparency - you see exactly why each job was recommended to you.
faq.answer3: Yes! YuvaSetu is completely free for students. We believe every student deserves access to quality career opportunities without financial barriers. Our mission is to help you find the right job, not to profit from your job search.
faq.question4: How is this different from other job portals?
faq.answer4: Unlike traditional job portals that overwhelm you with hundreds of listings, YuvaSetu shows you only your top 5 most relevant matches. We use explainable AI to tell you exactly why each job fits you, eliminating guesswork and opportunity fatigue.
faq.answer5: YuvaSetu is built with production-ready technology optimized for scale. By using efficient ML models instead of heavy LLMs, we deliver superior results with lower cost, lower latency, and high scalability - ready to serve millions of users.
faq.answer6: Employers can post job opportunities on YuvaSetu and leverage our AI matching to find the best candidates. Our system helps you discover talent that truly fits your requirements, saving time and improving hiring quality.

about.teamDescription: We're a team of passionate innovators on a mission to transform the way students discover career opportunities through AI-powered matching and transparent recommendations.
about.missionText: At YuvaSetu, we believe that every student deserves access to opportunities that truly match their potential. We're eliminating opportunity fatigue by using explainable AI to show you only the most relevant jobs - with complete transparency on why each match matters.

problems.title: Ending Opportunity Fatigue
problems.subtitle: Job seekers across all fields are overwhelmed by endless, irrelevant listings. YuvaSetu cuts through the noise with intelligent, transparent matching for every career path.
problems.choiceOverloadDesc: Instead of hundreds of irrelevant listings, see only the top 3-5 most relevant opportunities curated for you.
problems.lackOfTransparencyDesc: Explainable AI (XAI) scores show exactly why you matched—70% skills, 30% location. No black box.
problems.noResumeDesc: YuvaSetu auto-generates an ATS-friendly resume from your profile. Zero stress, maximum impact.
problems.connectivityDesc: Never miss opportunities. Get alerts via SMS and WhatsApp, even with limited internet access.

differentiation.title: How We're Different
differentiation.subtitle: We're not just another job portal. Experience the YuvaSetu difference.
differentiation.qualityDesc: While others bombard you with hundreds of irrelevant listings, we use AI to curate only your top 5 most relevant opportunities. Save time, reduce stress, find better matches.
differentiation.fasterResultsDesc: Get matched in seconds, not hours of scrolling
differentiation.fullTransparencyDesc: See exact match breakdown with explanations
differentiation.matchAccuracyDesc: Semantic AI understands your true skills
differentiation.top5Desc: No endless scrolling. We show you only your best 5 matches, saving hours of job hunting.
differentiation.completeTransparencyDesc: See exactly why you matched - 70% skills, 30% location. No black box algorithms.
differentiation.explainableAiDesc: Our AI explains every recommendation. Understand your matches, make informed decisions.
differentiation.zeroResumeStressDesc: Auto-generate ATS-friendly resumes from your profile. Professional results in seconds.

matchingEngine.title: Semantic AI That
matchingEngine.subtitle: Our advanced AI understands meaning, not just keywords. Whether it's Data Science, Marketing, Finance, or HR—we match you with roles that truly fit your skills.
matchingEngine.top5Desc: No endless scrolling! Get only your top 5 most relevant opportunities, saving hours of job hunting.
matchingEngine.transparencyDesc: See exactly why you matched—70% skills, 30% location. No mystery, no guesswork, just clear explanations.
matchingEngine.resumeDesc: Auto-generate ATS-friendly resumes from your profile in seconds. No formatting stress, just professional results.

team.title: Building for Scale
team.description1: Team Havoc isn't just building a prototype—we're delivering a production-ready, scalable platform. Our system is optimized to run efficiently while delivering human-level matching intelligence.
team.description2: By focusing on efficient, lightweight ML instead of heavy large language models, YuvaSetu delivers superior results with lower cost, lower latency, and high scalability.
